metadata.description: Marketplace for the claude-docs-creator monorepo — docs-creator toolkit + component-creator plugin.

plugins.name: docs-creator
plugins.description: Authoring, validation, and drift-detection for .claude/ docs in any project. Ships 15 api skills (init-project, analyze-frontend, create-frontend-docs, update-frontend-docs, create-sequences, check-links, analyze-api-contracts, create-api-contracts-docs, update-api-contracts-docs, create-api-contract, create-docs, update-docs, validate-claude-docs, status, menu), 12 agents, 10 rules, 6 hooks.

plugins.name: component-creator
plugins.description: Figma-to-code component creation with visual verification, Figma Code Connect integration, and component registry management. Reads docs-creator analysis output to generate components matching project conventions.
